# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Explore an engineering portfolio example blending technical prowess with indie web aesthetics. Interactive projects showcase mechanical and electrical engineering innovation.

### Projects
https://example.com/projects
Dive into hands-on mechanical engineering portfolio projects with interactive demos. Each build tells a story of problem-solving, design iteration, and technical mastery.

### About
https://example.com/about
Meet the engineer merging retro web design with cutting-edge technical skills. Discover the journey, philosophy, and passion driving every engineering portfolio piece.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to collaborate on your next engineering challenge? Connect for project inquiries, technical consultations, or just to talk shop about innovative design solutions.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
